text: All comparables have been found in the subject's neighborhood on the eastside of Bloomington, IL and were selected to demonstrate the marketabiltiy of houses of a similar location, design, quality, condition, GLA, and room count. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a 6.7% market time adjustment based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for GLA, basement finished room count, lack of an enclosed porch, and lack of a fence. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its GLA, basement finished room count, lack of an enclosed porch, and lack of a fence. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, quality, age, GLA, and garage space count.
